cat_size.label: Cat Size
cat_size.description: Sprite size in the bar, in pixels.

show_cpu_percent.label: Show CPU Percentage
show_cpu_percent.description: Display the CPU percentage next to the cat.

walk_threshold.label: Walk Threshold
walk_threshold.description: CPU percentage at which the cat wakes up and starts walking.

run_threshold.label: Run Threshold
run_threshold.description: CPU percentage at which the cat breaks into a run.

poll_interval.label: CPU Poll Interval
poll_interval.description: How often to sample CPU usage, in seconds.

cat_color_mode.label: Cat Color
cat_color_mode.description: Use the current theme color, or pick a custom color below.

cat_color.label: Custom Color
cat_color.description: Used when Cat Color is set to Custom.
